title: The Lost Treasure of the SS Central America

segments.text: In 1857, the SS Central America sank with $400 million in gold.
The ship was traveling from Panama to New York when it went down.
A storm caused the ship to capsize off the coast of Carolina.
Over 400 passengers lost their lives, along with the gold.
The wreck was discovered in 1988, revealing only a fraction of the treasure.
Where did the rest of the treasure go?
Follow because some cases still need answers.

description: The SS Central America sank in 1857, taking precious gold and lives with it. Follow for daily cold cases! 🗝️
